category_sources: source_facts.description says it checks CloudFormation templates for compliance using declarative syntax; AWS official docs describe Guard as policy-as-code evaluation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cloudformation-guard; AWS official docs use the product name AWS CloudFormation Guard.
docs_sources: Official AWS CloudFormation Guard user guide is the dedicated documentation surface; official GitHub README is repository documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supports CloudFormation compliance and declarative policy tags; source_facts.executables identifies a CLI tool.
